side_effects.description: hives all over legs, thighs, and ass from Blue Sky Peptides brand CJC/IPAM 7 years ago
same reaction recurred when retested with Blue Sky Peptides after trying other companies

protocol_notes: Medical professional. Used Blue Sky Peptides CJC/IPAM 7 years ago with hive reaction. Tried other companies without issues. Returned to Blue Sky to verify and reaction recurred. Attributed to preservatives/fillers in Blue Sky product. No reactions from Peptide Science brand. Recommends 3-6 month break before trying different company.
